title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Delhi - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Delhi - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!
